import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:5006/api/public';// Create axios instance with default configuration
const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Request interceptor to add auth token if available
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('authToken');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});// Response interceptor for error handling
api.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('authToken');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});// API Service Methods
export const apiService={// Authentication
auth:{login:data=>api.post('/auth/login',data),register:data=>api.post('/auth/register',data),verifyOtp:data=>api.post('/auth/verify-otp',data),googleLogin:token=>api.post('/auth/google',{token}),logout:()=>api.post('/auth/logout')},// States (Masters)
states:{getAll:()=>api.get('/states'),getById:id=>api.get("/states/".concat(id))},// Cities (Masters)
cities:{getAll:()=>api.get('/districts'),getByState:stateId=>api.get("/districts?stateId=".concat(stateId)),getById:id=>api.get("/districts/".concat(id))},// Categories
categories:{getAll:()=>api.get('/categories'),getById:id=>api.get("/categories/".concat(id)),getByParent:parentId=>api.get("/categories?parentId=".concat(parentId)),search:query=>api.get("/categories/search?q=".concat(query))},// Businesses/Companies
businesses:{getAll:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/companies',{params});},getById:id=>api.get("/companies/".concat(id)),getByCategory:function(categoryId){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/companies/category/".concat(categoryId),{params});},getByCity:function(cityId){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/companies/city/".concat(cityId),{params});},search:function(query){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/companies/search?q=".concat(query),{params});},create:data=>api.post('/companies',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/companies/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/companies/".concat(id))},// Public Companies (for search functionality)
publicCompanies:{getAll:()=>api.get('/companies'),getById:id=>api.get("/companies/".concat(id))},// Public Businesses (for business-specific details like hours)
publicBusinesses:{getAll:()=>api.get('/businesses'),getById:id=>api.get("/businesses/".concat(id))},// Products
products:{getAll:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/products',{params});},getById:id=>api.get("/products/".concat(id)),getByBusiness:function(businessId){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/products/company/".concat(businessId),{params});},getByCategory:function(categoryId){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/products/category/".concat(categoryId),{params});},search:function(query){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/products/search?q=".concat(query),{params});},create:data=>api.post('/products',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/products/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/products/".concat(id))},// Reviews
reviews:{getAll:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/reviews',{params});},getById:id=>api.get("/reviews/".concat(id)),getByBusiness:businessId=>api.get("/reviews/company/".concat(businessId)),getByProduct:productId=>api.get("/reviews/product/".concat(productId)),create:data=>api.post('/reviews',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/reviews/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/reviews/".concat(id))},// Users
users:{getProfile:()=>api.get('/users/profile'),updateProfile:data=>api.put('/users/profile',data)},// Banners/Ads
banners:{getAll:()=>api.get('/banners'),getByCategory:categoryId=>api.get("/banners/category/".concat(categoryId))},// Trending/Popular
trending:{getSearches:()=>api.get('/trending/searches'),getCategories:()=>api.get('/trending/categories')},// Leads/Enquiries
leads:{create:data=>api.post('/leads',data)}};export default api;
